component_styling.cards: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 rounded-3xl shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF7A00] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold hover:bg-[#FFA64D] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-[#FF7A00]/20
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#FF7A00] border border-[#FF7A00]/20 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold hover:bg-[#F8F8F8] transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-gray-600 hover:text-[#FF7A00] hover:bg-[#FF7A00]/10 rounded-full px-6 py-3 transition-all

component_styling.inputs: bg-[#F8F8F8] border-transparent focus:border-[#FF7A00] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF7A00]/20 rounded-xl px-4 py-3

Login_Signup.layout: Split screen or modal card over premium background.
Login_Signup.components: Logo, Title, Email/Password Inputs, Primary Login CTA.

Home_Dashboard.hero: Full-width image card with overlay, greeting text, and 'Design Your Dream Space' CTA.
Home_Dashboard.tools: Bento grid of cards (AI Generator, Vastu, Ideas) with subtle orange gradients.
Home_Dashboard.recent_projects: Horizontal scroll or 2-column grid of thumbnails.

Wizard_Step_1_Upload.layout: Large dropzone/upload area, placeholder empty room image, minimal text.

Wizard_Step_2_RoomType.layout: Grid of room types with icon/image and label.

Wizard_Step_3_Budget.layout: Interactive slider with preset pills (₹50K to ₹10L+).

Wizard_Step_4_ColorPalette.layout: Color swatches with labels (Modern White, Luxury Gold, Earthy Brown, etc.).

Wizard_Step_5_Requirements.layout: Large text area, 'Generate Design' primary CTA.

Loading_Screen.layout: Centered animated loader, glassmorphic card showing steps: Analysis -> Generation -> Cost -> Vastu.

Design_Ready.layout: Image comparison slider (Before/After), list of furniture items with prices, total estimate card.

Vastu_Shastra.layout: Circular score gauge (0-100), lists of Positive Aspects, Issues, and Recommendations. Abstract Vastu background.

hero_images.description: Luxury Modern Living Room Orange Accents

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Shadcn components for complex interactions but strictly apply the provided custom Tailwind classes. Implement a mobile-first responsive layout. Apply the glassmorphism and shadow tokens specifically on cards to achieve the premium aesthetic. Rely on the provided primary (#FF7A00) as the only vibrant brand color, allowing #FFFFFF and #F8F8F8 to provide a luxurious spacious backdrop. Follow the 5-step wizard structure exactly as outlined.
